Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

If I cook a cake (made with grains) the day before ekadasi,is it still ok to eat it after ekadasi?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2010-11-18 · 3 answers
I heard somewhere that it is not ok to eat the grains prepared before the ekadasi after the ekadasi.The idea was that the grains get contaminated during the ekadasi and are therefore not to be eaten after the ekadasi.Would someone kindly shed some light on this issue?

Thank you
user [366] · 2010-11-18
A sastric reference would be nice, but as far as I know, grains are contaminated only on Ekadasi. You can find this in the Ekadasi Mahatmya book that ISKCON sells at Krishna.com or Krishna Culture.
user [616] · 2010-11-19
You are right.I just found a quote confirming that the prasad cooked on ekadasi can be eaten the next day..i heard something that confused me so i needed to check.
user [149] · 2010-11-20
Please post the quote, source and author.
